question: The chart shows the percentage of people who prefer different Valentine’s gifts. Based on the percentage labels, which statement is supported by the data?

options.A: Flowers have the highest preference among all the categories.
options.B: Jewelry has the highest preference among all the categories.
options.C: Cards and Candy are preferred by the same percentage of people.
options.D: The categories all have nearly identical preference percentages.

explanation: The labels show the actual values; dot positions are based on a different 'visual_height' scale, so the visual can suggest a different ranking than the data.
